input: What is the baggage allowance for economy class?
expected_output: Economy class passengers are allowed one checked bag up to 23 kg and one cabin bag up to 7 kg.
actual_ouput: Economy passengers can carry 1 checked bag (23 kg) and 1 cabin bag up to 7 kg.
retrieval_context: Airline baggage policy states that economy class passengers can carry 1 checked bag up to 23 kg and 1 cabin bag up to 7 kg. Additional baggage may incur extra charges.

input: How can I check my flight status?
expected_output: You can check your flight status on the airline website or mobile app using your flight number or booking reference.
actual_ouput: Flight status can be checked on the airline website or app using the flight number or PNR.
retrieval_context: Passengers can check real-time flight status via the airline website or mobile application by entering the flight number or PNR.

input: Can I change my flight date?
expected_output: Yes, you can change your flight date through the Manage Booking section, subject to fare rules and change fees.
actual_ouput: Yes, flight dates can be modified from Manage Booking depending on fare rules and change charges.
retrieval_context: Flight changes can be made through the Manage Booking portal depending on ticket fare rules. Change fees and fare differences may apply.

input: What should I do if my flight is cancelled?
expected_output: If your flight is cancelled, you can request a full refund or rebook another flight through customer support or the website.
actual_ouput: If the airline cancels your flight, you can request a refund or choose a free rebooking option.
retrieval_context: In case of flight cancellation by the airline, passengers are eligible for a refund or free rebooking on the next available flight.

input: How early should I arrive at the airport for an international flight?
expected_output: Passengers should arrive at least 3 hours before departure for international flights.
actual_ouput: It is recommended to reach the airport at least 3 hours before an international flight.
retrieval_context: Airline check-in guidelines recommend arriving at the airport at least 3 hours before international departures.

input: Can I select my seat before the flight?
expected_output: Yes, you can select your preferred seat during booking or later through Manage Booking.
actual_ouput: Yes, seat selection is available during booking or later via Manage Booking.
retrieval_context: Seat selection is available during ticket booking or later through the Manage Booking feature on the airline website or app.

input: What documents are required for check-in?
expected_output: You need a valid government-issued ID for domestic flights and a passport and visa for international flights.
actual_ouput: Domestic travel requires a government ID, while international flights require a passport and visa.
retrieval_context: Check-in requires valid identification. Domestic flights require government ID, while international travel requires passport and visa.

input: How can I request special assistance at the airport?
expected_output: You can request special assistance while booking your ticket or by contacting customer support at least 48 hours before departure.
actual_ouput: Special assistance like wheelchair service can be requested during booking or 48 hours before departure.
retrieval_context: Passengers requiring wheelchair or medical assistance should request it during booking or inform the airline at least 48 hours before departure.

input: What is the policy for carry-on baggage?
expected_output: Passengers can carry one cabin bag up to 7 kg and one personal item such as a laptop bag or handbag.
actual_ouput: Carry‑on allowance includes 1 cabin bag up to 7 kg plus one personal item like a laptop bag.
retrieval_context: Carry-on policy allows one cabin bag weighing up to 7 kg along with one personal item like a laptop bag or purse.

input: How can I cancel my flight ticket?
expected_output: You can cancel your ticket through the Manage Booking section or by contacting customer support.
actual_ouput: Tickets can be cancelled through Manage Booking online or by contacting airline support.
retrieval_context: Flight tickets can be cancelled online through Manage Booking or by contacting the airline customer support team.

input: Will I get a refund if I cancel my ticket?
expected_output: Refund eligibility depends on the ticket fare rules and cancellation policy.
actual_ouput: Refunds depend on fare rules and may include cancellation charges.
retrieval_context: Refunds are processed based on the fare rules of the ticket. Some tickets are refundable while others may incur cancellation fees.

input: Can I add extra baggage after booking my flight?
expected_output: Yes, you can purchase additional baggage through the Manage Booking section before your flight.
actual_ouput: Yes, extra baggage can be purchased online through Manage Booking before departure.
retrieval_context: Passengers can pre-purchase additional baggage allowance online through the Manage Booking portal before departure.

input: How do I check in online?
expected_output: You can check in online by visiting the airline website or app and entering your booking reference.
actual_ouput: Online check-in can be completed on the airline website or app using the booking reference or PNR.
retrieval_context: Online check-in opens 24–48 hours before departure and can be completed using the PNR or booking reference.

input: What happens if I miss my flight?
expected_output: If you miss your flight, you should contact customer support immediately to explore rebooking options.
actual_ouput: Passengers who miss their flight should contact the airline to check rebooking possibilities.
retrieval_context: Passengers who miss their flight should contact the airline as soon as possible. Rebooking may be available depending on ticket conditions.

input: Can I travel with pets on the airline?
expected_output: Yes, pets can travel either in the cabin or as checked baggage depending on airline policy and size restrictions.
actual_ouput: Small pets may travel in cabin carriers, while larger pets may travel as checked baggage depending on policy.
retrieval_context: Airline pet travel policy allows small pets in cabin carriers and larger pets as checked baggage subject to regulations.

input: How can I contact airline customer care?
expected_output: You can contact customer care via phone, email, or live chat on the airline website.
actual_ouput: Customer care can be reached through phone, email, or website live chat.
retrieval_context: Customer support is available through multiple channels including phone helpline, email support, and live chat.

input: What is the check-in deadline for domestic flights?
expected_output: Domestic flight check-in usually closes 45 minutes before departure.
actual_ouput: Check-in counters for domestic flights typically close 45 minutes before departure.
retrieval_context: Airport counters for domestic flights typically close 45 minutes before the scheduled departure time.

input: Can I upgrade my seat to business class?
expected_output: Yes, you can upgrade your seat subject to availability through Manage Booking or at the airport.
actual_ouput: Seat upgrades to business class may be available online or at the airport if seats are available.
retrieval_context: Seat upgrades to business class may be available online, during check-in, or at the airport depending on seat availability.

input: Do airlines provide meals during flights?
expected_output: Meal availability depends on the flight duration and ticket type.
actual_ouput: Meals may be complimentary or paid depending on route and fare type.
retrieval_context: Airlines provide complimentary or paid meals depending on route length, fare type, and service class.

input: How can I download my boarding pass?
expected_output: You can download your boarding pass after completing online check-in via the airline website or mobile app.
actual_ouput: After online check-in, the boarding pass can be downloaded from the airline website or app.
retrieval_context: After completing online check-in, passengers can download or receive a digital boarding pass through the airline website or mobile app.
